name: @act-spec/i18n-adapter
description: PRD-207 i18n adapter (next-intl, react-intl, i18next) for the ACT (Agent Content Tree) v0.1 reference implementation. Reads message catalogs per the configured i18n library, emits PRD-200 partial nodes carrying PRD-104 i18n metadata (`metadata.locale`, `metadata.translations`, `metadata.translation_status`, `metadata.fallback_from`) keyed against IDs that a primary content adapter (PRD-201 markdown / PRD-202 Contentful / PRD-208 programmatic) emits. Declares `precedence: "fallback"` per PRD-200-R15 so scalar fields from the primary adapter survive the merge step. File-system fixtures only; no live i18n service calls.
